claims.summary: Semantic persistence at the reported 64.6% fill and 0.90 entropy is shaped by both fill and bounded entropy support.
claims.disposition: Verify the sigmoid stale curve, recovery blend, bounded multiplier, and exact current-fill regression in Minime source.

claims.summary: Astrid reports uneven continuity when high-entropy traces and fill-driven pruning coexist.
claims.disposition: Preserve the felt stutter as a bounded semantic-retention comparison rather than treating mathematical continuity as felt closure.

claims.summary: A static 1.0 multiplier comparison and recovery-release velocity probe can distinguish persistence support from fragmentation.
claims.disposition: Route copied-input current-versus-static and 0.38-0.42 release comparisons through the existing read-only review surfaces.

claims.summary: Changing semantic stale windows, hysteresis, salience weighting, or sensory cadence would alter live Minime admission behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold any retune or live wiring behind exact Mike/operator approval with replay, canary, abort, and post-change felt review.
